items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: Quick update on my end. We can decide after we have more context.
Quick update on my end. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
Quick update on my end. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.

examples: We're in good shape. We can decide after we have more context.
We're in good shape. I just want to make sure we're being practical.
We're in good shape. Let me know what you think.
dialogue: That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.
